nasb.text: the two pillars and the two bowls of the capitals which were on the top of the two pillars, and the two networks to cover the two bowls of the capitals which were on the top of the pillars;

esv.text: the two pillars, the two bowls of the capitals that were on the tops of the pillars, and the two latticeworks to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the tops of the pillars;

cnv.text: 所做的就是兩根柱子和在柱子頂上碗形的柱頂；兩塊遮蓋柱子頂上碗形柱頂的網子；

ccb.text: 他所制造的有两根柱子，两个碗状的柱冠，两个装饰柱冠的网子，
